prompt:
Vertical 4:5 portrait social-media poster, GTA Vice City aesthetic redesign for the Muha Members Giveaway. The REFERENCE image is the locked typography / palette / Muha logo / layout anchor — reproduce its: ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest logo at the top center, the EXACT headline typography style described below (this is the most important fidelity criterion), red subtitle banner styling, lighting mood, and overall Vice City neon-noir feel.

NO QR CODE: do NOT include any QR code anywhere. Do NOT include any 'SCAN FOR APP' callout. The lower portion is the atmospheric VIP nightclub background.

PALETTE — LOCKED: dominant CRIMSON / SCARLET RED (#B81020 / #E0202C / #FF2F3F) with WARM ORANGE-RED accents, deep black, wet-asphalt charcoal, warm gold accents on the Muha crest. ABSOLUTELY NO pink, NO magenta, NO teal, NO cyan, NO purple.

HEADER TYPOGRAPHY — CRITICAL FIDELITY: render the headline in the exact GTA Vice City poster lettering style of the reference. Specifically:
  • Bold blocky sans-serif letterforms with thick uniform strokes (similar to a heavy GTA-style display face, NOT chrome, NOT silver, NOT glossy).
  • Letter FACE: warm cream / pale peach color with a subtle reddish-orange tint, rendered with a faint stone / concrete / weathered-marble TEXTURE across the face — slightly grainy and organic, not smooth, not shiny. Almost like the letters are made of sunbaked sandstone or warm aged plaster.
  • Letter OUTLINE: a thin dark maroon / dried-blood red outline around each letter edge.
  • GLOW: a strong warm red-orange GLOW HALO radiating OUTWARD from behind and beneath every letter — like the letters are backlit by red neon, with the glow softly bleeding into the surrounding dark background and casting warm light on the letters' undersides.
  • DEPTH: 3D extruded shadow underneath the letters in deep maroon, so each letter casts depth into the glow.
  • POSTURE: slight forward italic skew (~5-8°), dynamic stance.
  • All caps, perfectly horizontally centered, two stacked lines exactly like the reference: line 1 'GET IN', line 2 'THE LIST'. The phrase is 'GET IN THE LIST' — NOT 'GET ON THE LIST'.
  • Match the reference's exact lettering style 1:1.

SUBTITLE: in the same red banner-bar styling as the reference, all caps, perfectly horizontally centered directly below the headline, reading 'BECOME A MEMBER TODAY'. Red bar background, white-stroked text, same proportions as the reference subtitle.

MUHA LOGO: at the very top center, ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest, exact match to reference.

BACKGROUND — NEW UNIQUE CONCEPT, ALL-RED PALETTE: a GTA Vice City VIP nightclub entrance at night. Velvet-rope barrier with two glowing brass stanchions and a deep crimson rope; a chic doorway with a RED-NEON palm-tree silhouette sign above it; the words 'VICE CITY' subtly glowing in RED neon as part of the club facade (small, not competing with the headline); wet rain-slicked black asphalt and curb reflecting RED neon only; a hint of palm fronds backlit in red; a distant Miami night skyline with warm red-orange ambient glow on the horizon; out-of-focus silhouettes of stylish nightclub-goers in the distance suggesting an exclusive line, lit from behind by red neon. Opulent, exclusive VIP entrance. NO Dodge Challenger, NO stacks of cash.

Retain the reference's grain / halation / cinematic finish. Sharp focus on the headline, subtitle, and Muha logo; background atmospheric with shallow depth-of-field. Photorealistic but stylized like a high-end editorial movie poster. No additional text beyond what's specified above.
refImages: Muha Giveaway Redesigned/Final/Get on the List.png
